name: Golden-Tempered Jade
effect:
Restores 18–22% of Max HP to the selected character.
Regenerates 300–470 HP every 5s for the next 30s.
description: A chicken dish native to Liyue. Prepared with simple spices, it strives to highlight the authentic flavor of fresh ingredients. The finished dish has smooth skin, tender meat, and a fresh taste, and is especially delightful when paired with a dipping sauce.

suspicious.effect: Restores 18% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 300 HP every 5s for 30s.
suspicious.description: A chicken dish native to Liyue. Its skin is a tantalizing bright yellow, beautifully contrasting with the pale, tender-looking meat beneath. Yet the moment you take a bite, regret sets in — the meat is dry and tough, wedging itself stubbornly between your teeth...

normal.effect: Restores 20% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 390 HP every 5s for 30s.
normal.description: A chicken dish native to Liyue. Prepared with simple spices, it strives to highlight the authentic flavor of fresh ingredients. The finished dish has smooth skin, tender meat, and a fresh taste, and is especially delightful when paired with a dipping sauce.

delicious.effect: Restores 22% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 470 HP every 5s for 30s.
delicious.description: A chicken dish native to Liyue. The skin has a satisfying firmness, and the meat is tender and flavorful. The natural gelatin from the chicken, set into a jelly, brims with the rich aroma of rendered chicken fat, and even the bones carry a subtle hint of sweetness. This dish is a true symphony of flavors, certain to delight even the most discerning gourmand.
